description: Cross-agent routing evaluation. Each test case maps a user prompt to the expected agent.

test_cases.prompt: scope a new POC for Contoso on claims automation
I just had a call with Tailspin about content understanding — help me write up the brief
kick off full delivery for the Fabrikam interview scoring POC
there's a bug in the API — the /scores endpoint returns 500
run the customer handoff pipeline for Northwind
build a FastAPI backend with Azure OpenAI integration for the chatbot
add a React frontend with Fluent UI components for the broker workbench
implement RAG with AI Search and Cosmos DB for the knowledge base
set up the Bicep templates for Container Apps with Key Vault and managed identity
create Terraform for the Azure AI Foundry resources with private endpoints
provision the VNet, subnets, and NSGs for the POC environment
write the azure.yaml and configure azd for deployment
review the code for security issues before the customer demo
test the application end-to-end — click through the UI and verify everything works
validate the Bicep templates compile and the RBAC is least privilege
generate an architecture diagram showing all the Azure services and data flow
create a C4 context diagram for the claims processing system
write the README with quick start, architecture overview, and deployment steps
create the customer handoff document with executive summary and next steps
write a deployment guide with step-by-step instructions for the customer
triage my inbox — clean up the junk and show me what needs responses
help me respond to my urgent emails
inbox status — what's the damage?
new POC setup — we need a RAG chatbot for Fabrikam market research
test_cases.note: new-poc-setup is a QB task type, not scoper (BRIEF already exists)

test_cases.prompt: the diagram has overlapping nodes and wrong icons — fix it
test_cases.note: Direct diagram fix request, not QA review

test_cases.prompt: add SignalR for real-time updates to the frontend
set up GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for the POC
check if the app handles weird input gracefully — test edge cases
what are my top 3 urgent emails right now?
I need to scope an engagement for a new insurance client wanting AI-powered underwriting
design the architecture for a new RAG chatbot POC for Contoso
should we use Container Apps or App Service for this workload? give me the trade-offs
produce ARCHITECTURE.md with parallelization tracks for the document processing POC
estimate the monthly Azure cost for the proposed stack
audit the .gitignore and run a secret scan before I push
set up GitHub Actions CI/CD with OIDC to Azure
is this POC ready to be made public on GitHub?
create a customer-handoff branch with release notes and push
check for any leaked API keys in git history
